zh.lifeSummary: 當William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick於1390年之後出生在英國蘇格蘭時，他的父親William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick19996歲，母親Margaret de la Haye8637歲。他於1411年5月1日之後與Beatrice Sinclair在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年之前在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick于1390年之后出生在英国苏格兰时，他的父亲William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick19996岁，母亲Margaret de la Haye8637岁。他于1411年5月1日之后与Beatrice Sinclair在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年之前在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Borthwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the old barony of Borthwick, formerly Loquhariot (Midlothian) and possibly also from Borthwick (Roxburghshire). The placenames are from Old English bord ‘board, table’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick was born after 1390, in Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, was 19996 and his mother, Margaret de la Haye, was 8637. He married Beatrice Sinclair after 1 May 1411, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died before 1450, in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick est né après 1390, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, avait 19996 ans et sa mère, Margaret de la Haye, avait 8637 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Sinclair après 1 mai 1411, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 1450, à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick nach 1390 in Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick 19996 und seine Mutter Margaret de la Haye 8637. Er hat nach 1. Mai 1411 in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Beatrice Sinclair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 1450 in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick è nato il dopo il 1390 nel Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, aveva 19996 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de la Haye, aveva 8637 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice Sinclair dopo il 1 maggio 1411, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1450, nel Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwickが1390年以後にイギリススコットランドで生まれた時，父William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwickは19996歳，母Margaret de la Hayeは8637歳であった。1411年5月1日以後にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンでBeatrice Sinclairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年以前にスコットランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick(이)가 1390년 이후 영국 스코틀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick(은)는 19996세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de la Haye(은)는 8637세였다. 그는 1411년 5월 1일 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 Beatrice Sinclair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 이전 스컷랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick nasceu após 1390, em Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, tinha 19996 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de la Haye, tinha 8637 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Sinclair após 1 de maio de 1411, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1450, em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick родился после 1390 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick было 19996 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de la Haye, 8637. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Sinclair после 1 май 1411 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 1450 г. в местности Шотландия.

sm.Aft 1390–before 1450: ina ua ma'ea le 1390–a'e le'I oo le 1450

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Borthwick 2nd of Borthwick nació después de 1390, en Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Borthwick of Cactune, 1st of Borthwick, tenía 19996 años y su mamá, Margaret de la Haye, tenía 8637 años. Se casó con Beatrice Sinclair después de 1 de mayo de 1411, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1450, en Scotland.
